title: Carry On Chest
description: Allows you to move chests by shift + right clicking them with an empty hand preserving their contents.
body:
Sneak + right-click any container with an empty hand to pick it up — contents and all
Place it back down anywhere to restore everything perfectly
Supports: Chest, Trapped Chest, Barrel, Shulker Box, Hopper, Furnace, Blast Furnace, Smoker, Dropper, Dispenser
Prevents pickup if another player currently has the container open
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
